title: conflict_resolved/v1 payload
description: Payload for resolution events on integrity flags. Manual resolutions emit with envelope type=review. Phase 4 auto-resolutions emit with envelope type=capture and actor_ref.id prefix 'system:auto_resolution/{policy_id}' — discrimination between human and automated resolution lives in actor_ref, NOT in this payload. The resolution enum stays at 3 values; do not bump to v2 to model automation.

source_event_id.description: Denormalised reference to the underlying domain event.

resolution.description: accepted = include in state derivation; rejected = permanently excluded; reclassified = event attributed to a different subject (requires reclassified_subject_id; identity_conflict flags only).

reclassified_subject_id.description: Required iff resolution = reclassified. Null otherwise.

reason.description: Optional free-text explanation from the resolving actor.
